loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD (thd_compliance_i_avg) as a proxy for both I-THD and V-THD, as specific voltage THD columns are not logged for this asset. H5 and H7 values are bound to R-phase current THD as the closest available harmonic distortion proxy.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing Current THD (I-THD) time-series trends; Voltage THD (V-THD) and specific harmonic orders (H5/H7) are not measured by this meter and are left blank.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: K-Factor is not directly measured; showing Load Factor (active power / rated capacity) as a proxy for harmonic-driven transformer stress. True PF and PF Gap are derived from active and apparent power.
